content:
The A2 Chapter 4 major enemies have Tentacles that keep growing in number the more time it passes, and most times they interact directly with them.
What I think, and what others have expressed, is that it seems like too much of a dps check and constant damage source, that is also very disruptive for DR and it doesn't interact with counter.
Normally the fights have some scaling mechanics, like staking str\madness\etc, but the tentacle gathering ramp up too fast, and most enemies have intentions that further boost the tentacle damage on top of that.
Only Murphy have a mechanics that lower the tentacle numbers if you can damage her enough, and even there, is normally not enough because the incredible fortress and non decaying shields she get.

I think this mechanic should be looked in more an possibly tone down or reworked in some other way. 
**What do you think?**

命輪「命運賭輪盤」在一般關卡和相位對弈都有內建計數器和比例顯示，好希望其他有次數上限與比例差異的命輪和密契也能得到計數器或顯示器。另外也希望有冷卻時間的裝備也能獲得類似不死鳥的復活冷卻的倒數計時器。

我目前以手邊物資及商店看得到的資料整理出了有次數上限、冷卻會合及比例效果的裝備，這份整理可能有缺漏，僅供參考：

>> 一次：
溯洄時計、跨越疼痛、
虔誠的偉力、珊瑚女之死、於暴雨之中、
沉入殷紅、
被縛的歌謠、迷失的道路、
迫近的太陽、
靈魂誕生（各一次）、
盒中童趣（整趟探索）、聖火中的指引（整趟探索）
塔薇狂氣爆發、
「24」超限爆發、波呂克斯超限爆發

>> 兩次：
隱密的誕生、
女王的戒律、快樂魔法秀、
記憶症候

>> 三次：
星天之獸、堅韌意志、
蒼白後裔、
聚首時刻、苦咒縛、切割與傷害、
猩紅之擁、
索蕾爾超限爆發

>> 三回合冷卻：
安息之吻、
不可承受的自由、
你我終將重逢、
甜蜜蛞蝓

>> 五次：
隱世的輪轉、永恆安魂曲、
重生於湮土、
銀鱈魚的決心（兩回合共用）、
奧瑞塔超限爆發、卡茜亞超限爆發、
薩爾瓦多超限爆發（整趟探索）

>> 按比例：
無垢啟示錄、光合祭禮、
吞噬產生的護盾和臨時力量

>> 死亡抵抗次數換算比例：
克珀珊特狂氣爆發、
菲茵特啟靈三

>> 其他換算：
墨菲技能卡「螺湮逆流」
thread_title: ✅「已回答」可否增設命輪和密契的計數器

content:
如題，命輪抽＋12可以雙持，但角色+12給的bonus太少了。
這讓我感覺角色抽+12巨虧，不如命輪+12，建議建議角色+12能給些啥特效(比如特殊語音之類的）
thread_title: ✅「已回答」建議角色＋12需要有特效比較吸引人抽＋12（比起命輪）

content:
My friend just recently started playing, and they found that the tutorial breaks upon reaching the "tema lineup" section, and is unable to progress in the game. Any assistance would be appreciated, thank you <:bow:1356053037159944473> 

<@&1166257943742787615>

When cards have too much text on them, scrolling becomes weird. Specifically, the start of the scrolling will be based on where you click on the card itself, rather than simply starting from the top. 

This isn't an issue for most cards, but for very long ones it is.

An easy example is Hyperflare. When holding Hyperflare, if you don't click near the top of the card, you will be unable to see the damage value on it (because it's in the first line). If you move the card around a bunch it can sometimes appear briefly but the only way to read it properly is to click on top of the card (and read before it scrolls down). You cannot scroll back up with the mouse wheel either.

Another example is most of the special story mode cards once they're fully upgraded. For example chapter 6 card or arc2 chapter 3 card (including the unique card you get during the last boss).

A potentially "easy" fix would be to make it so it always starts from the top regardless of where you click on the card to hold it. Alternative allow scrolling back up with mousewheel(might not be very useable on mobile though).

Added a video of the issue with Hyperflare.
https://youtu.be/9hFKzfZBlPM
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Scrolling issues on cards with long descriptions
